chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-152 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For hearing of bail application 22-04-2024 M/s Ali Gul Abbasi and Nisar Ahmed Mallah, Advocate a/w applicant. Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate for complainant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. ***** It appears that pre-arrest bail application of the applicant was dismissed by trial Court merely on the ground that he was not present on the date of hearing and the proof submitted by his counsel with his application seeking condonation of his absence was not reliable. Notwithstanding, the Court was required to discuss tentatively merits of the case and decide whether applicant was entitled to concession of pre-arrest bail or not. Palpably, the Court has failed to consider the rules regarding disposal of pre-arrest bail application. Hence, with consent, impugned order is set aside and the Crl. Bail Application No.305 of 2024 is allowed to be deemed to be pending before the Court of II-Additional Sessions Judge, Naushahro Feroze and applicant on bail, if his surety is still intact before it and if not, he will have to furnish required surety in the same amount. The Court shall hear both the parties and decide bail application in accordance with law. Applicant shall not remain absent in future. The bail application is accordingly disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
